en: Don't ever let anyone step all over you
Just open your heart and your mind
Is it really fair to feel this way inside?
Someday somebody's gonna make you wanna turn around and say goodbye
ko: 언젠가 누군가가 당신을 돌아서게 하고 작별 인사를 하게 만들 거예요

en: Until then, baby, are you gonna let him hold you down and make you cry?
ko: 그때까지, 아가, 그가 당신을 억누르고 울게 할 수 있도록 두겠어요?

en: Don't you know? Don't you know?
Things could change, things will go your way
ko: 상황은 변할 수 있고, 당신에게 유리하게 흘러갈 거예요

en: If you hold on for one more day
Can you hold on for one more day?
Hold on for one more day
